verdict_reason: The 2.49 analog uses tags ['fruits-of-action', 'outcome-detachment', 'shipping-discipline', 'judgment-under-uncertainty']. Cross-checking against same-tag verses already shipped: 2.47 uses 'shipping-discipline' and 'outcome-detachment'; 2.48 uses 'operator-system-coupling' (different). 2.49's contribution to the 'fruits-of-action' tag is the specifically COMPARATIVE claim — fruit-driven action is far below buddhi-yoga — which complements rather than duplicates 2.47's structural claim (right to action, not to fruits). The 'outcome-detachment' tag is shared with 2.47 but the 2.49 reading adds the kṛpaṇa-tagging (pitiable, not just wrong) which is the verse's specific tonal contribution. No doctrine-clash with shipped verses. The cross-references in the source pack (2.39 frame, 2.47/2.48 continuation, 18.66 thematic resonance) are doctrinally sound. Pass.
